name: Manufacturing Full Implementation
description: Complete Manufacturing implementation workflow: analyze products, design BOMs and routings, configure work centers, validate MRP setup, and deploy.

steps.name: Analyze Products & Demand
steps.description: Identify manufactured products, variants, units of measure, and demand patterns

steps.name: Design Bills of Materials
steps.description: Create multi-level BOMs with components, operations, by-products, and variant rules

steps.name: Design Routings & Operations
steps.description: Define operation sequences, work centers, setup/run times, and attach routings to BOMs

steps.name: Configure Work Centers
steps.description: Set up work centers, calendars, capacity, alternative centers, and costs

steps.name: Setup MRP Planning
steps.description: Configure reordering rules, routes, procurement groups, and scheduler frequency

steps.name: Pilot Manufacturing Order
steps.description: Run a pilot MO through confirmation, planning, production, and closure to validate setup

steps.name: Train Users & Go Live
steps.description: Train production planners, shop floor operators, and warehouse staff; enable shop floor tablet if licensed
